stem: A machine learning team needs to adapt a foundation model in Bedrock to understand proprietary medical terminology using a large corpus of unlabeled clinical notes. Which customization approach should they use?

options.B: Continued pre-training with the clinical notes corpus
options.C: Retrieval-Augmented Generation with a medical knowledge base

explanation: Continued pre-training is designed for domain adaptation using large amounts of unlabeled text. It teaches the model domain-specific vocabulary and patterns. Fine-tuning requires labeled input-output pairs and is for task-specific behavior. RAG retrieves at inference time but does not change model weights. Prompt engineering does not modify the model.
distractors: Fine-tuning requires labeled data; RAG doesn't modify model weights; Prompt engineering doesn't change the model
